程序包的使用
org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event

  • 使用org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event的程序包 
    程序包 说明
    org.apache.dubbo.registry.client
    * The inspiration of service registration and discovery comes from Spring Cloud Commons.
    org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event  
    org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event.listener  
    org.apache.dubbo.registry.consul  
    org.apache.dubbo.registry.etcd  
  • org.apache.dubbo.registry.client使用的org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event中的类 
    类和说明
    ServiceInstancesChangedEvent
    An event raised after the instances of one service has been changed.
  • org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event使用的org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event中的类 
    类和说明
    ServiceDiscoveryEvent
    An abstract Event class for ServiceDiscovery
    ServiceInstanceEvent
    The Dubbo event for an service instance
  • org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event.listener使用的org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event中的类 
    类和说明
    ServiceDiscoveryDestroyedEvent
    An event raised after the Service Discovery destroyed.
    ServiceDiscoveryDestroyingEvent
    An event raised when the Service Discovery is destroying.
    ServiceDiscoveryInitializedEvent
    An event raised after the Service Discovery initialized
    ServiceDiscoveryInitializingEvent
    An event raised when the Service Discovery is initializing.
    ServiceInstancePreRegisteredEvent
    An event raised before a service instance registered
    ServiceInstancePreUnregisteredEvent
    An event raised before a service instance unregistered
    ServiceInstanceRegisteredEvent
    An event raised after a service instance registered
    ServiceInstancesChangedEvent
    An event raised after the instances of one service has been changed.
    ServiceInstanceUnregisteredEvent
    An event raised after a service instance unregistered
  • org.apache.dubbo.registry.consul使用的org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event中的类 
    类和说明
    ServiceInstancesChangedEvent
    An event raised after the instances of one service has been changed.
  • org.apache.dubbo.registry.etcd使用的org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event中的类 
    类和说明
    ServiceInstancesChangedEvent
    An event raised after the instances of one service has been changed.
